color_profiles.name: Fresh Native Silver
color_profiles.cause: reflective metallic surface of unoxidized silver

color_profiles.name: Tarnished Silver
color_profiles.cause: silver sulfide (acanthite) tarnish layer from H2S exposure

visual_notes: Fresh specimens show brilliant silver-white metallic luster. Tarnish develops complex gray-black patinas. Kongsberg wire-silver specimens are among the most celebrated native metal mineral specimens in existence.

optical_effects.iridescence: tarnish iridescence common on oxidized surfaces
optical_effects.play_of_color: tarnish iridescence common on oxidized surfaces
